exampleSentencesTranslated: He is currently drinking orange juice.
She is currently reading a new book.
I am currently watching a new movie.
exampleSentences: Anh ấy đang uống nước cam.

definitions.en: A word used to indicate an action that is happening at the present moment.
definitions.vi: Từ dùng để chỉ hành động đang diễn ra ở hiện tại.

notes:
đang means “currently” or “in the middle of doing something.” It shows an action is happening right now.

It goes before a verb to mark ongoing action.  

It’s like the English “-ing” form. To compare timelines, pair it mentally with đã (past) and sẽ (future).
sentenceBreakdowns: Anh ấy (he) + đang (currently) + uống (drink) + nước cam (orange juice)
Chị (she) + đang (currently) + đọc (read) + sách mới (new book)
Em (I) + đang (currently) + xem (watch) + phim mới (new movie)
notes_md:
**đang** means “currently” or “in the middle of doing something.” It shows an action is happening right now.

It goes **before a verb** to mark ongoing action.  

It’s like the English “-ing” form. To compare timelines, pair it mentally with **đã** (past) and **sẽ** (future).
